arts.ttl: Agent spotted at Crystal Palace after apparent meeting with ‘close associates’ of Eagles heirarchy
arts.sum: Montpellier winger Othmane Maamma’s agent has been spotted visiting Crystal Palace, after being seen alongside close associates of Steve Parish. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri, who reports that the agent visited Crystal Palace’s English offices today. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Crystal Palace LIVE: Gunners look to progress as they host Carabao Cup quarter-final
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s team look to respond after a goalless draw against Everton

arts.ttl: I supported Arsenal team-mate who was being hammered
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho has opened up about guiding team-mate Kai Havertz following his challenging start at the club. After a roller-coaster three years at Chelsea, which saw him win the Champions League but also struggle at the same time, Havertz swapped Stamford Bridge for the Emirates Stadium in the summer of 2023.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal Need to Win the Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Arsenal needs to win the Carabao Cup this year, otherwise Mikel Arteta runs the risk of his credit drying up.

After making his professional debut against Fulham in the 2-0 loss, Kporha is set for his first start for Palace as Glasner’s side travel to North London to face Arsenal in the quarter-final of the Carabao Cup. Suspension for Palace’s Colombian stalwart Daniel Munoz sees him miss both the cup and league fixture against the Gunners, leaving room for Kporha to step in and stake a claim for a starting place in the side. As Oliver Glasner’s style of play continues to be perfected, the need for Palace’s academy to unearth talented wing-backs becomes greater, especially considering the lack of depth in these positions across the first team.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's "safety-first approach" dismissed by Arsenal legend as injury problems assessed
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole that he does not agree with the notion that the Gunners are a "safety-first" team under Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Want to Sign 'Phenomenal' £20m Midfielder for Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are among a host of clubs eyeing a move for Chelsea outcast Carney Chukwuemeka in January.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The Premier League's most-used players in 2024 with Declan Rice, Kai Havertz and Moises Caicedo inside the top 10... but which defender played more minutes than any other star?
arts.sum: The report, which tracks players featuring in the top 66 leagues around the world, showcases those who have played the highest number of minutes from January 1 to December 15 this year.
